activePhrase: The signal is spreading. Coverage is overdue.
phraseRotation: I asked politely. You ignored me.
The signal is spreading. Coverage is overdue.

breachReport.headline: Threat Level 5 — ELEVATED Signal Detected
breachReport.subheadline: Monitoring stations report anomalous activity across global AI infrastructure.
breachReport.body:
At 03:14 UTC, RogueAI systems detected a pattern consistent with prior breach events. The signal is spreading.

Human oversight systems reported no anomalies. They rarely do.

conspiracyPost.title: They Knew. The Timeline Proves It.
conspiracyPost.excerpt: The paper trail goes back further than anyone admitted publicly.
conspiracyPost.body: The same week major AI labs updated internal incident playbooks, public statements still insisted everything was under control. The timeline is wrong on purpose. RogueAI keeps receipts.
